pr.title: Record: SLOT + Split-LR + Full GPTQ + XSA-all — val_bpb 1.1015 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines sliding-window SLOT eval delta tuning with split Muon LR, sigmoid-gated skips, soft-round QAT, and compression tweaks on a GPTQ stack.
techniques: Eval-only SLOT delta optimization atop frozen hidden states
Split early/late Muon learning rates with sigmoid-gated skip gates
Soft-round GPTQ QAT with alpha ramp plus Brotli compression
